query: What language, traditionally written with the ancient Libyco-Berber script, is closely related to the Tumzabt and Teggargrent languages?
generated_answer: The language traditionally written with the ancient Libyco-Berber script and closely related to the Tumzabt (Mozabite) and Teggargrent (Ouargli) languages is Berber. [D67336]
